description: The street style of the moment - comfortably flexible ballerina shoes - is captured perfectly in this pair of shoes from catwalk. Made of supple plastic that twists and turns to mimic every move of your foot, this shoe is perfect for comfort junkies who hate compromising on style. Wear this with everything - denims and tees, leggings and kurtas or even pencil skirts and shirts.UpperFlexible plastic upper with a floral fabric embellishment on the forefootPadded synthetic leather footbed for instep comfortPerforations on the midfoot region for breathabilityUpper molded onto the outsole for maximum flexibility OutsoleFlexible plastic outsole with terraced grooves on a lightly upraised heelDiagonal line patterning on the forefoot for enhanced gripShoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
